mapper.select:
SELECT A.APPLY_NO, A.PERSON_ID, E.EMPID, E.LOCAL_NAME, E.DEPTNO AS DEPT_NO, TO_CHAR(A.LEAVE_FROM_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS LEAVE_FROM_TIME, TO_CHAR(A.LEAVE_TO_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS LEAVE_TO_TIME, A.LEAVE_REASON, A.LEAVE_TYPE_NO, A.LEAVE_TYPE_CODE, A.APPLY_LENGTH, AR_GET_DAY_HOURS(A.PERSON_ID, TO_CHAR(A.LEAVE_FROM_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD')) AS DAY_HOURS, GET_VAC_COUNT(A.PERSON_ID, A.CPNY_ID, TO_CHAR(A.LEAVE_FROM_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_CHAR(A.LEAVE_TO_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AS ANNUAL_LEAVE_COUNT, TO_CHAR(A.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_DATE, GET_DEPT_NAME(E.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEPT_NAME, A.AFFIRM_FLAG, GET_UPDATED_INFO(A.CREATED_BY) AS CREATED_BY, A.CREATED_IP, TO_CHAR(A.UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATE_DATE, GET_UPDATED_INFO(A.UPDATED_BY) AS UPDATED_BY, A.UPDATED_IP, ( SELECT LISTAGG('

' || S.AFFIRM_LEVEL || '. ' || NVL(HE.EMPID, '') || ' - ' || NVL(HE.LOCAL_NAME, '') || '

', '') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY S.AFFIRM_LEVEL) FROM SY_AFFIRM_EMAIL S LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE HE ON S.AFFIRM_PERSON_ID = HE.PERSON_ID WHERE S.APPLY_NO = TO_CHAR(A.APPLY_NO) AND S.AFFIRM_LEVEL > 0 ) AS AFFIRM_STR FROM ESS_LEAVE_APPLY_TB A LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE E ON E.PERSON_ID = A.PERSON_ID WHERE A.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND UPPER(E.EMPID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{empId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' AND UPPER(E.LOCAL_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{localName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' AND A.LEAVE_FROM_TIME >= TO_DATE(#{fromDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND A.LEAVE_FROM_TIME < TO_DATE(#{toDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1 AND A.AFFIRM_FLAG = #{affirmFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TO_CHAR(A.CONFIRM_FLAG) = #{confirmFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.LEAVE_TYPE_CODE = #{leaveTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND EXISTS ( SELECT B1.DEPTID FROM HR_DEPARTMENT B1 WHERE B1.DEPTNO = E.DEPTNO START WITH B1.DEPTNO IN ( SELECT HRD.DEPTID FROM HR_DEPARTMENT HRD WHERE HRD.MANAGER_EMP_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) CONNECT BY PRIOR B1.DEPTNO = B1.PARENT_DEPT_NO UNION SELECT ASI.DEPTNO FROM AR_SUPERVISOR_INFO ASI WHERE ASI.DEPTNO = E.DEPTNO AND ASI.PERSON_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ORDER BY A.CREATE_DATE DESC, E.EMPID

SELECT HE.EMPID, HE.LOCAL_NAME, HE.PERSON_ID, HE.DEPTNO AS DEPT_NO, HE.CPNY_ID, HE.POST_GRADE_NO, ESS.APPLY_NO, ESS.LEAVE_TYPE_CODE, GET_DEPT_NAME(HE.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEPT_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(ESS.LEAVE_TYPE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS LEAVE_TYPE_NAME, TO_CHAR(ESS.LEAVE_FROM_TIME, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI') AS LEAVE_FROM_TIME, TO_CHAR(ESS.LEAVE_TO_TIME, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI') AS LEAVE_TO_TIME, ESS.APPLY_LENGTH, AR_GET_DAY_HOURS(HE.PERSON_ID, TO_CHAR(ESS.LEAVE_FROM_TIME, 'YYYY/MM/DD')) AS DAY_HOURS, ESS.LEAVE_REASON, ESS.AFFIRM_FLAG, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(ESS.AFFIRM_FLAG, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS AFFIRM_FLAG_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(HE.POST_GRADE_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS POST_GRADE_NAME, TO_CHAR(ESS.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_DATE, ESS.DETAIL_TYPE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(ESS.DETAIL_TYPE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DETAIL_TYPE_NAME, ESS.ACTIVITY, ESS.CONFIRM_FLAG FROM ESS_LEAVE_APPLY_TB ESS INNER JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE HE ON ESS.PERSON_ID = HE.PERSON_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(ESS.APPLY_NO) = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT ESS.DEPTNO, GET_DEPT_NAME(HE.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEPTNAME, ESS.EMPID, ESS.APPLY_NAME, ESS.LEAVE_TYPE_CODE, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(ESS.LEAVE_TYPE_CODE, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS LEAVE_TYPE_NAME, ESS.LEAVE_FROM_DATE, ESS.LEAVE_FROM_TIME, ESS.LEAVE_TO_DATE, ESS.LEAVE_TO_TIME, CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(ESS.LEAVE_FROM_DATE, '^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}$') AND REGEXP_LIKE(ESS.LEAVE_TO_DATE, '^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}$') AND REGEXP_LIKE(ESS.LEAVE_FROM_TIME, '^[0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}$') AND REGEXP_LIKE(ESS.LEAVE_TO_TIME, '^[0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}$') THEN GET_AR_LEAVE_LENGTH( GET_EMP_PERSONID(ESS.EMPID, ESS.CPNY_ID), ESS.CPNY_ID, COMPOSE_DATE(TO_DATE(ESS.LEAVE_FROM_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), ESS.LEAVE_FROM_TIME), COMPOSE_DATE(TO_DATE(ESS.LEAVE_TO_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), ESS.LEAVE_TO_TIME), ESS.LEAVE_TYPE_CODE ) ELSE NULL END AS APPLY_LENGTH, ESS.LEAVE_REASON, ESS.AFFIRM_FLAG, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(ESS.AFFIRM_FLAG, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS AFFIRM_FLAG_NAME, GET_UPDATED_INFO(ESS.UPLOAD_BY) AS UPLOAD_BY, TO_CHAR(ESS.UPLOAD_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPLOAD_DATE, ESS.CPNY_ID, ESS.LINE_ID, ESS.UPLOAD_ERROR_MSG, ESS.RESULT_FLAG FROM ESS_LEAVE_APPLY_TB_EXCEL_TEMP ESS INNER JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE HE ON ESS.EMPID = HE.EMPID AND ESS.CPNY_ID = HE.CPNY_ID WHERE ESS.UPLOAD_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND NVL(TRIM(ESS.UPLOAD_ERROR_MSG), '') <> ''
AND NVL(TRIM(ESS.UPLOAD_ERROR_MSG), '') = ''
ORDER BY CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(ESS.LINE_ID, '^[0-9]+$') THEN TO_NUMBER(ESS.LINE_ID) ELSE 99999999 END, ESS.LINE_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ESS_LEAVE_APPLY_TB ( APPLY_NO, PERSON_ID, APPLY_TIME, LEAVE_FROM_TIME, LEAVE_TO_TIME, LEAVE_REASON, LEAVE_TYPE_NO, LEAVE_TYPE_CODE, APPLY_LENGTH, AFFIRM_FLAG, CONFIRM_FLAG, CPNY_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, ACTIVITY ) VALUES ( #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, TO_DATE(#{leaveFromTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), TO_DATE(#{leaveToTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), #{leaveReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '21', #{leaveTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, GET_AR_LEAVE_LENGTH( #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_DATE(#{leaveFromTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), TO_DATE(#{leaveToTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), GET_CODE_NO(#{leaveTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '21', #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'CODE') ), '14014306', 0, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1 )
mapper.update: UPDATE ESS_LEAVE_APPLY_TB SET PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, APPLY_TIME = SYSDATE, LEAVE_FROM_TIME = TO_DATE(#{leaveFromTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), LEAVE_TO_TIME = TO_DATE(#{leaveToTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), LEAVE_REASON = #{leaveReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LEAVE_TYPE_CODE = #{leaveTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, APPLY_LENGTH = GET_AR_LEAVE_LENGTH( #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_DATE(#{leaveFromTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), TO_DATE(#{leaveToTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), GET_CODE_NO(#{leaveTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '21', #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'CODE') ), AFFIRM_FLAG = '14014306', ACTIVITY = 1, CONFIRM_FLAG = 0, CONFIRM_DATE = NULL, CONFIRM_BY = NULL, CONFIRM_IP = NULL, CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE APPLY_NO = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM AR_APPLY_RESULT WHERE APPLY_NO = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
DELETE FROM ESS_LEAVE_APPLY_TB WHERE APPLY_NO = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT AR_GET_DAY_HOURS(#{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_DATE(#{fromDateTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI')) AS DAY_HOUR, GET_AR_LEAVE_LENGTH( #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_DATE(#{fromDateTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), TO_DATE(#{toDateTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), GET_CODE_NO(#{leaveTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '21', #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'CODE') ) AS LEAVE_LENGTH FROM DUAL

SELECT SUM(TOT_VAC_CNT + ADD_VAC + LAST_YEAR_VAC) AS TOT_VAC_CNT, SUM(USE_VAC + AFFIRM_USE_VAC + USE_VAC_CNT) AS USE_VAC, SUM(TOT_VAC_CNT + ADD_VAC + LAST_YEAR_VAC - USE_VAC - AFFIRM_USE_VAC - USE_VAC_CNT) AS REMAIN_VAC, SUM(TOT_VAC_CNT) AS YEAR_VAC_CNT, SUM(ADD_VAC) AS ADD_VAC, SUM(LAST_YEAR_VAC) AS LAST_YEAR_VAC FROM ( SELECT A.TOT_VAC_CNT, A.ADD_VAC, A.MENT_VAC, A.USE_VAC_CNT, A.LAST_YEAR_VAC, AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE,'YYYY/MM/DD'), TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE,'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'CONFIRM') AS USE_VAC, AR_USE_VACATION(TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DATE,'YYYY/MM/DD'), TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE,'YYYY/MM/DD'), A.CPNY_ID, A.PERSON_ID, 'AFFIRM') AS AFFIRM_USE_VAC FROM AR_VAC_EMP A WHERE A.PERSON_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.ACTIVITY = 1 AND SYSDATE BETWEEN A.STRT_DATE AND A.END_DATE )

WITH SHIFT_DATA AS ( SELECT get_ar_shift_start_time(#{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS START_TIME, get_ar_shift_end_time(#{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS END_TIME FROM DUAL ) SELECT SD.START_TIME, SD.END_TIME, GET_VAC_COUNT( #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SUBSTR(NVL(SD.START_TIME, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI')), 1, 10), SUBSTR(NVL(SD.END_TIME, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI')), 1, 10) ) AS VAC_COUNT, GET_GLOBAL_NAME( GET_AR_SHIFTNO(#{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS SHIFT_NAME, GET_DEPT_NAME(HE.DEPTNO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS DEPT_NAME FROM SHIFT_DATA SD, HR_EMPLOYEE HE WHERE HE.PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT GET_AR_LEAVE_LENGTH( #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_DATE(#{fromTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), TO_DATE(#{toTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), GET_CODE_NO(#{leaveTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '21', #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'CODE') ) AS LEAVE_LENGTH FROM DUAL
SELECT AR_GET_LEAVE_CLASH('', #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fromTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{toTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) FROM DUAL
mapper.update: UPDATE ESS_LEAVE_APPLY_TB SET ACTIVITY = 1, AFFIRM_FLAG = '14014310', UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE APPLY_NO = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT SY.APPLY_NO, SY.APPLY_TYPE, SY.APPLY_FLAG FROM SY_AFFIRM_EMAIL SY WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SY_AFFIRM_EMAIL SY2 WHERE SY.APPLY_NO = SY2.APPLY_NO AND SY.APPLY_TYPE = SY2.APPLY_TYPE AND SY.APPLY_FLAG = SY2.APPLY_FLAG AND SY2.SEQ = (SELECT MAX(SEQ) FROM SY_AFFIRM_EMAIL WHERE APPLY_NO = #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR})) AND ROWNUM < 2

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ESS_LEAVE_APPLY_TB A WHERE A.PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.ACTIVITY = 1 AND A.AFFIRM_FLAG NOT IN ('14014309', '14014310') AND NVL(A.CONFIRM_FLAG, 0) != 0 AND A.LEAVE_FROM_TIME < TO_DATE(#{leaveToTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AND A.LEAVE_TO_TIME > TO_DATE(#{leaveFromTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI')
AND TO_CHAR(A.APPLY_NO) != #{applyNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
